name: VRHandsFrame
short_description: VRHandsFrame is a epoch-making VR overlay application that allows you to crop your VR view with intuitive hand gestures.
detailed_description:
VRHandsFrame is a epoch-making VR overlay application that allows you to crop and analyze your VR view with intuitive hand gestures.

While playing a VR game, users can use intuitive gestures to crop the scenery they see on the head-mounted display.

You can also temporarily bookmark the cropped image in VR, or translate the text in the image.

Various actions on the cropped images

  • Temporary saving in VR (bookmark)

  • Text translation

  • 2D code reading

  • Share images with Steam friends who owns VRHandsFrame

VRHandsFrame is like a secret tool that gives your VR life a Slightly-Futuristic experience.

supported_languages: English, Japanese, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Polish, Ukrainian, Dutch, Swedish, Thai, Czech, Turkish, Norwegian, Finnish
